{{character info}} ==Translingual== ===Han character=== {{Han char|rn=170|rad=阜|as=07|sn=10|four=71221|canj=NLYLH|ids=⿰阝步}} ====Derived characters==== * {{l|mul|[[騭]]([[骘]])}} ====References==== * {{Han ref|kx=1351.160|dkj=41659|dj=1853.270|hdz=64131.010|uh=965F}} ==Chinese== {{zh-forms|alt=𰂮}} ===Glyph origin=== {{Han etym}} {{Han compound|阜|alt1=阝|步|t1=mound; hill; raised ground|t2=step; two feet pointing upwards|ls=ic}}. Cf. {{zh-l|降}}, with two feet pointing downwards. ===Etymology=== From {{inh|zh|sit-pro|*l-t(j)ak||to climb; to ascend}} (STEDT). Compare {{och-l|登}} ({{zh-ref|Wang, 1923}}) < {{m|sit-pro|*tVŋ}}, as well as {{cog|my|တက်|t=to climb up, get in a vehicle}}; see the latter for more cognates. ===Pronunciation=== {{zh-pron |m=zhì |m-s= |c=zik1 |c-t= |g= |h= |j= |mb= |md= |mn=xm,zz:tek/qz:tiak/tw:thek |mn-t= |mn-l= |w= |x= |x-l= |x-h= |mc=y |oc=y |cat=v }} ===Definitions=== {{head|zh|hanzi}} # {{lb|zh|literary}} to [[climb]]; to [[ascend]] #* {{zh-x|陟 彼 屺 兮，瞻 望 母 兮。|I '''ascend''' that bare hill,
And look towards my mother.|ref=Shijing}} # {{lb|zh|archaic|euphemism|of a monarch}} to [[die]]; to ascend to heaven #* {{zh-x|十二 年，^王 陟。|In the twelfth year (of his reign), {{w|King Gong of Zhou|the King}} '''ascended'''.|ref=Zhushu Jinian}} # {{lb|zh|literary}} to [[promote]] #: {{zh-x|陟罰臧否{pǐ}|'''to reward''' good people and to punish bad people}} ===Compounds=== {{col3|zh|考績黜陟|陟屺|陟岵|陟岵瞻望|陟岵陟屺|陟方|陟罰|陟罰臧否|陟降|陟黜|韋陟朵雲|黜陟|黜陟幽明|武陟}} ===References=== * {{R:yue:Hanzi}} {{C|zh|Death}} ==Japanese== ===Kanji=== {{ja-kanji|grade=|rs=阜07}} # [[climb]] # [[rise]] ====Readings==== {{ja-readings |goon=ちき |kanon=ちょく |kanyoon=とく |kun=のぼ-る, すす-む |nanori=たかし, のぼる }} ==Korean== ===Hanja=== {{ko-hanja|hangeul=척|eumhun=|rv=cheok|mr=ch'ŏk|y=chek}} # [[climb]], [[scale]], [[ascend]] # [[proceed]] ==Vietnamese== ===Han character=== {{vi-readings|reading=trắc|rs=阜07}} # {{rfdef|vi|sort=阜07}}
